text: Create the €15k funding package: 2-pager, deck, demo, use of funds, and clear ask
description: Produce a compact package usable for angels and design partners: one-line category, concrete user/problem, working-product proof, why Git-native intent/dependency infrastructure is differentiated, founder/team credibility, 6-month milestones, exact €15k minimum ask (with a larger sensible round range), and use of funds. Reuse the Build Week demo so one artifact serves both tracks. Avoid unsupported TAM claims and ASI-heavy framing in the first contact.
reflection: Created meta/applications/funding-15k-2026 with a two-pager, deck outline, 3-minute demo script, EUR 15k use-of-funds plan, outreach templates, and qualified funding routes. Positioning is Git-native intent and dependency infrastructure for AI-assisted development. Ask is EUR 15k minimum by 2026-08-31, toward a EUR 50k bridge, with 3 x EUR 5k paid design partnerships as a parallel route. Live checks on 2026-07-20 confirm Prototype Fund applications open 2026-10-01 and EXIST is conditional on founder/institution eligibility. git diff --check passes. Human confirmation remains for Robin Maier's role/permission, contact details, legal instrument, and externally supportable evidence/screenshots.

status.comment: Funding package drafted and internally checked; ready to show the user before final completion.
